summary: US and Israeli forces conducted retaliatory strikes against Iranian military targets in the Strait of Hormuz region after Iranian drone and missile attacks on commercial shipping and Gulf states. An IDF platoon commander was killed in a clash with a Hezbollah operative in southern Lebanon, while Iran's Assembly of Experts members condemned continued Israeli operations in Lebanon as a violation of the Iran-US framework agreement. The conflict is expanding across multiple theaters with direct US-Iran military exchanges in the Strait of Hormuz and Iranian strikes on Bahrain and Kuwait.
key_points: US Central Command confirmed American fighter jets from the Navy and Air Force struck 10 Iranian military targets at multiple points in the Strait of Hormuz in retaliation for Iranian drone attacks on the commercial tanker M/T Kiku. (Source: @lelotsenzura/93287)
Iran launched drone strikes on US bases in Bahrain and Kuwait; Bahrain reported a residential building in Muharraq province was hit with no injuries reported. (Source: @VahidOnline/76730)

IDF Cpt. David Hazutt, 21, a platoon commander in Golani Brigade's 12th Battalion from Ashkelon, was killed around 2 a.m. in a clash with a Hezbollah operative while entering a structure in the village of Deir Siryan in southern Lebanon. (Source: @manniefabian/58695)

63 members of Iran's Assembly of Experts stated that continued Israeli attacks in Lebanon and the failure of the Lebanese army to withdraw from southern Lebanon constitute a clear violation of the Iran-US framework agreement, and that reopening the Strait of Hormuz would violate officials' commitments. (Source: @VahidOnline/76713)

President Trump warned that if Iran continues violating the ceasefire, the Islamic Republic of Iran will no longer exist, stating the US is currently targeting Iranian missile and drone storage sites and coastal radar stations. (Source: @inon_yttach/9184)

The Israeli Chief of Staff expressed support for the agreement with Lebanon, calling it historic and significant, while Netanyahu stated the Lebanese government showed great courage and described it as a major blow to Iran and Hezbollah. (Source: @amitsegal/62595)

The commercial tanker M/T Kiku struck by Iranian weapons was en route from Qatar to the port of Fujairah in the UAE; Iran also launched two drones at Bahrain, one intercepted and one falling without causing damage. (Source: @New_security8200/202119)

IDF and Shin Bet eliminated the commander of Hamas's Central Camps naval police and two additional Hamas commanders who had recently been advancing terror plots against IDF forces. (Source: @almogboker78/17620)

sections.executive_summary: US forces conducted retaliatory strikes on 10 Iranian military targets in the Strait of Hormuz following Iranian drone attacks on a commercial tanker and US bases in Bahrain and Kuwait. An IDF officer was killed in southern Lebanon during a clash with a Hezbollah operative in Deir Siryan, while Iran's Assembly of Experts condemned continued Israeli operations in Lebanon as a violation of the Iran-US framework agreement. President Trump issued a stark warning that continued Iranian ceasefire violations could lead to the end of the Islamic Republic.

points: 63 members of Iran's Assembly of Experts issued a joint statement through Tasnim and Fars news agencies declaring that continued Israeli attacks in Lebanon and the Lebanese army's failure to withdraw from southern Lebanon constitute a clear violation of the Iran-US framework agreement, and that reopening the Strait of Hormuz would be contrary to officials' commitments. (Source: @VahidOnline/76713)

Iran launched drone strikes on US bases in Bahrain and Kuwait early Sunday; one drone hit a residential building in Muharraq province, Bahrain, causing damage to the upper floor of an apartment complex with no injuries reported. (Source: @VahidOnline/76730)
Iran fired weapons at the commercial tanker M/T Kiku in the Strait of Hormuz; the vessel was traveling from Qatar to the port of Fujairah in the UAE. (Source: @New_security8200/202119)

Explosions were reported in southern Iran, including near the naval base at Sirik and the village of Tahruyi Sirik in Hormozgan province, with projectiles striking a communications tower in the area. (Source: @VahidOnline/76715)

The US dollar reached 172,000 tomans on Iran's free market on Sunday, a rise of over 5,000 tomans from Saturday's rate of 166,700 tomans, following the recent Iran-US framework agreement. (Source: @VahidOnline/76729)
Smoke was observed rising near Mehrabad airport in Tehran, though no explosions were heard and it was assessed as likely a fire. (Source: @shin_persian/7257)

IDF Cpt. David Hazutt, 21, from Ashkelon, a platoon commander in the Golani Brigade's 12th Battalion, was killed around 2 a.m. during a clash with a Hezbollah operative while entering a structure in the village of Deir Siryan in southern Lebanon; another soldier was lightly wounded. (Source: @manniefabian/58695)

The Israeli Chief of Staff expressed support for the agreement with Lebanon during a discussion approving plans for continued operations in the Northern Command, calling it historic and significant, and stating both sides now face a test of implementation. (Source: @amitsegal/62595)

Netanyahu stated the Lebanese government discovered great courage in reaching the agreement, describing it as a major blow to Iran and Hezbollah, and noted that the US and Lebanon told Iran this is not their concern. (Source: @almogboker78/17610)

According to the security annex of the Israeli-Lebanese framework agreement, the IDF will enter areas to verify that the Lebanese army has indeed dismantled Hezbollah infrastructure, following previous incidents where the Lebanese army provided false reports about infrastructure clearance. (Source: @inon_yttach/9193)

IDF and Shin Bet eliminated the commander of Hamas's Central Camps naval police and two additional Hamas commanders who had recently been advancing terror plots against IDF forces; two more Hamas naval police commanders were also killed in the strike. (Source: @almogboker78/17620)

IDF and Shin Bet conducted a targeted strike eliminating the commander of Hamas's Central Camps naval police along with two additional Hamas commanders and two more naval police commanders operating under Hamas's military wing. (Source: @almogboker78/17620)
The eliminated Hamas naval police commanders had recently been advancing and directing terror plots against IDF forces and the State of Israel. (Source: @almogboker78/17620)

IDF Cpt. David Hazutt was killed and another soldier lightly wounded during a clash with a Hezbollah operative around 2 a.m. while Golani Brigade soldiers entered a structure in the village of Deir Siryan in southern Lebanon; troops launched searches for the operative and struck Hezbollah sites in the area. (Source: @manniefabian/58695)

The Israeli Chief of Staff expressed support for the newly signed agreement with Lebanon, calling it historic and significant, while emphasizing that the coming period will test both sides' implementation. (Source: @amitsegal/62595)
Netanyahu praised the Lebanese government's courage in reaching the agreement, calling it a major blow to Iran and Hezbollah. (Source: @almogboker78/17610)

Under the security annex of the Israeli-Lebanese framework agreement, IDF forces will enter areas to verify that the Lebanese army has dismantled Hezbollah infrastructure, following previous incidents where the Lebanese army submitted false reports about clearing Hezbollah sites. (Source: @inon_yttach/9193)
Ali Akbar Velayati, an adviser to Iran's Supreme Leader, called Iran-backed Hezbollah the pillar of Lebanon's independence. (Source: @Faytuks_Network/4470)
Some Iraqi officials fled before the arrival of security forces in the Al Khdair area of Baghdad. (Source: @shin_persian/7258)
Additional security forces arrived in Kirkuk province to carry out arrest operations against officials accused of corruption cases. (Source: @naya_foriraq/80239)
An intense presence of security forces was reported in Kirkuk, Kurdistan Region of Iraq. (Source: @shin_persian/7268)

Bahrain reported that a residential building in Muharrag province was hit by an Iranian drone, with images showing damage to the upper floor of an apartment complex; no injuries were reported. (Source: @VahidOnline/76730)

Iran stated it targeted US bases in Bahrain and Kuwait in retaliation for US attacks; Bahrain and Kuwait both condemned the attacks, and Bahrain called for an emergency UN Security Council session to hold Iran accountable. (Source: @VahidOnline/76730)
The commercial tanker M/T Kiku, struck by Iranian weapons in the Strait of Hormuz, was traveling from Qatar to the port of Fujairah in the UAE. (Source: @New_security8200/202119)
Tehran-Dubai flights are set to resume starting tomorrow. (Source: @shin_persian/7267)

key_developments: US Central Command confirmed American fighter jets struck 10 Iranian military targets at multiple points in the Strait of Hormuz in retaliation for Iranian drone attacks on the commercial tanker M/T Kiku. (Source: @lelotsenzura/93287)

IDF Cpt. David Hazutt, 21, a Golani Brigade platoon commander from Ashkelon, was killed around 2 a.m. in a clash with a Hezbollah operative while entering a structure in Deir Siryan, southern Lebanon; another soldier was lightly wounded. (Source: @manniefabian/58695)

63 members of Iran's Assembly of Experts declared continued Israeli attacks in Lebanon and the Lebanese army's failure to withdraw from southern Lebanon constitute a clear violation of the Iran-US framework agreement. (Source: @VahidOnline/76713)
Iran launched drone strikes on US bases in Bahrain and Kuwait; one drone hit a residential building in Muharraq province, Bahrain, with no injuries reported. (Source: @VahidOnline/76730)

President Trump warned that continued Iranian ceasefire violations could result in the Islamic Republic of Iran no longer existing, as US forces target Iranian missile and drone storage sites and coastal radar stations. (Source: @inon_yttach/9184)

The Israeli Chief of Staff called the Lebanon agreement historic and significant, while Netanyahu stated the Lebanese government showed great courage and described it as a major blow to Iran and Hezbollah. (Source: @amitsegal/62595)

IDF and Shin Bet eliminated the commander of Hamas's Central Camps naval police and four additional Hamas naval police commanders who had been advancing terror plots against IDF forces. (Source: @almogboker78/17620)
sections.threat_assessment: The conflict is rapidly escalating across multiple theaters with direct US-Iran military exchanges now occurring in the Strait of Hormuz, marking a significant expansion beyond the Israel-Hezbollah front. Iran's drone strikes on Bahrain and Kuwait represent an attempt to widen the conflict to Gulf states, while the Assembly of Experts' statement signals internal Iranian political pressure against the framework agreement. The death of an IDF officer in Deir Siryan demonstrates Hezbollah's continued operational capability in southern Lebanon despite the new agreement. Trump's explicit threat that the Islamic Republic may cease to exist if violations continue raises the stakes of any further Iranian military action.
sections.regional_response: Bahrain and Kuwait condemned Iranian drone strikes on their territory, with Bahrain calling for an emergency UN Security Council session to hold Iran accountable. The UAE is indirectly affected as the struck tanker was en route to Fujairah port. Iran's Assembly of Experts is publicly challenging the framework agreement, with 63 members arguing that continued Israeli operations in Lebanon justify abandoning commitments regarding the Strait of Hormuz. The Israeli leadership is presenting the Lebanon agreement as a strategic achievement that weakens Iran and Hezbollah's position in the region.
sections.intelligence_notes: The IDF's verification mechanism under the Lebanon agreement — allowing Israeli forces to enter areas to confirm Hezbollah infrastructure dismantlement — reflects deep distrust based on prior Lebanese army false reporting. The US dollar's continued rise to 172,000 tomans despite the framework agreement suggests Iranian markets lack confidence in the deal's economic benefits. The targeting of Hamas's naval police command structure in Gaza indicates ongoing Israeli focus on degrading Hamas's military wing capabilities even as the northern front dominates attention. Explosions in southern Iran near Sirik naval base suggest the US strikes are hitting operational military infrastructure.
